input.instructions: Using the isothermal force F_iso(x) and the relation for adiabatic processes where dU = T dS + F dx, derive the adiabatic force F_ad(x). Assume the internal energy U depends only on the configuration through the potential energy of the struts (which is constant here) or focus on the change in entropy and temperature required to maintain constant total entropy S_total = S_conf(x) + S_thermal(T) during extension.

Question:
Using the isothermal force F_iso(x) and the relation for adiabatic processes where dU = T dS + F dx, derive the adiabatic force F_ad(x). Assume the internal energy U depends only on the configuration through the potential energy of the struts (which is constant here) or focus on the change in entropy and temperature required to maintain constant total entropy S_total = S_conf(x) + S_thermal(T) during extension.

results.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: F_ad(x) = F_iso(x) - T(x) dS_conf/dx
JUSTIFICATION: Adiabatic process requires constant total entropy S.
